top3.sql:
SELECT c.name, c.nationality, SUM(cr.points) AS total_points
FROM constructors c
JOIN constructorResults cr ON c.constructorId = cr.constructorId
JOIN races r ON cr.raceId = r.raceId
WHERE r.name = 'Monaco Grand Prix' AND r.year BETWEEN 1980 AND 2010
GROUP BY c.constructorId, c.name, c.nationality
ORDER BY total_points DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT c.name, c.nationality, SUM(cr.points) AS total_points
FROM constructors c
JOIN constructorResults cr ON c.constructorId = cr.constructorId
JOIN races r ON cr.raceId = r.raceId
WHERE r.name = 'Monaco Grand Prix' AND r.year BETWEEN 1980 AND 2010
GROUP BY c.constructorId, c.name, c.nationality
ORDER BY total_points DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT c.name, c.nationality, SUM(cr.points) AS total_points
FROM constructors c
JOIN constructorResults cr ON c.constructorId = cr.constructorId
JOIN races r ON cr.raceId = r.raceId
WHERE r.name = 'Monaco Grand Prix' 
  AND r.year >= 1980 
  AND r.year <= 2010
  AND cr.status = 'Finished'
GROUP BY c.constructorId, c.name, c.nationality
ORDER BY total_points DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT c.name, c.nationality, SUM(cr.points) AS total_points
FROM constructors c
JOIN constructorResults cr ON c.constructorId = cr.constructorId
JOIN races r ON cr.raceId = r.raceId
WHERE r.name = 'Monaco Grand Prix' AND r.year BETWEEN 1980 AND 2010
GROUP BY c.constructorId, c.name, c.nationality
ORDER BY total_points DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT c.name, c.nationality, SUM(cr.points) AS total_points
FROM constructors c
INNER JOIN constructorResults cr ON c.constructorId = cr.constructorId
INNER JOIN races r ON cr.raceId = r.raceId
WHERE r.name = 'Monaco Grand Prix' AND r.year >= 1980 AND r.year <= 2010
GROUP BY c.constructorId, c.name, c.nationality
ORDER BY total_points DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT c.name, c.nationality, SUM(cr.points) AS total_points
FROM constructors c
JOIN constructorResults cr ON c.constructorId = cr.constructorId
JOIN races r ON cr.raceId = r.raceId
WHERE r.name = 'Monaco Grand Prix' 
  AND r.year >= 1980 
  AND r.year <= 2010
  AND cr.status = 'Finished'
GROUP BY c.constructorId, c.name, c.nationality
ORDER BY total_points DESC
LIMIT 1;

final.sql:
SELECT c.name, c.nationality, SUM(cr.points) AS total_points
FROM constructors c
JOIN constructorResults cr ON c.constructorId = cr.constructorId
JOIN races r ON cr.raceId = r.raceId
WHERE r.name = 'Monaco Grand Prix' AND r.year BETWEEN 1980 AND 2010
GROUP BY c.constructorId, c.name, c.nationality
ORDER BY total_points DESC
LIMIT 1;
